ministry: Government of Rajasthan - Medical and Health Department
benefit_en: Up to Rs 25 lakh cashless health cover per family per year
steps_en: Register with Jan Aadhaar on the Chiranjeevi portal
Free for BPL/eligible categories; others pay small premium
Visit empanelled hospital for cashless treatment
Treatment covered up to Rs 25 lakh per year
scam_note: Treatment is cashless. Free for eligible families. Helpline: 18001806127.

ministry: Government of Rajasthan - Social Justice Department
benefit_en: Rs 750-1,500 per month to care for orphan and vulnerable children
steps_en: Apply via SSO Rajasthan portal or e-Mitra
Monthly amount credited to guardian's bank account
Annual renewal with school attendance proof
scam_note: Benefit comes directly to bank. Apply free via e-Mitra. No agent needed.

benefit_en: Free smartphone with 3 years of internet data for women heads of households
steps_en: Watch for camp announcement via Jan Aadhaar SMS
Visit designated camp with Jan Aadhaar
Choose mobile and data plan at camp
Receive smartphone with SIM and data
rejection_reasons: Not a woman head of household in Jan Aadhaar
scam_note: The smartphone is completely free at official camps. Never pay anyone for it.
